task_completion.description: Create a top-level block named 'Mars Perseverance Rover' with the <<System>> stereotype
task_completion.visual_evidence: A diagram block containing the text 'Mars Perseverance Rover' and the stereotype '<<System>>' above it.

task_completion.description: Create blocks for subsystems and components based on the specs
task_completion.visual_evidence: Multiple additional blocks present in the diagram with names such as Power, Mobility, Science, Arm, MMRTG, Wheels, Rocker-Bogie, SHERLOC, SuperCam, MOXIE, or PIXL.

task_completion.description: Include mass or location properties in blocks and multiplicity labels for quantities greater than one
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blocks contain property text (e.g., '45 kg', 'Turret', 'Mast') and there are multiplicity numbers (e.g., '6' for wheels) visible on the relationship lines or within the blocks.

task_completion.description: Connect the top-level block to subsystems and components using composition relationships
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines connecting the blocks that feature a solid (filled) diamond shape at the end connected to the parent/whole block.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as perseverance_bdd.drawio on the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'perseverance_bdd.drawio' is visible on the Desktop, or the diagramming application's title bar shows this filename.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as perseverance_bdd.png to the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file icon named 'perseverance_bdd.png' is visible on the Desktop, or an image viewer shows the exported PNG.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical diagramming tool (like draw.io) to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a diagramming application interface (e.g., draw.io/diagrams.net) open with the diagram being visually edited, rather than a text editor modifying XML.

integrity.description: The agent exported the PNG using the application's export functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: The file menu, export dialog, or save-as dialog in the diagramming tool is visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to simply download or copy a pre-made diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run commands like 'wget', 'curl', or 'cp' to place the final .drawio or .png files directly onto the Desktop without GUI interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required blocks include: Perseverance, Power, Mobility, Science, Arm, MMRTG, Wheels, Rocker-Bogie, SHERLOC, SuperCam, MOXIE, PIXL. Required attributes to look for inside blocks: '45 kg' (MMRTG/Turret mass), 'Turret' (Arm location), 'Mast' (SuperCam location). Multiplicity should indicate 6 wheels. Composition relationships must be represented by lines with solid/filled diamonds at the parent block end. At least 3 composition edges must be present for a valid diagram.
